title: TP Command Not Need To Permission(TP无需权限)
description: let all players freely use the  /tp  command without requiring admin or OP privileges.
body:
# Introduction

TP Command No Need Permission is an extremely lightweight Minecraft mod designed to let all players freely use the  /tp  command without requiring admin or OP privileges. Whether you are playing in singleplayer or on a multiplayer server, once this mod is installed, players can instantly teleport to specified coordinates or other players' locations.

 
 
# Main Features

Remove permission restrictions: Opens the  /tp  command to all players, removing the need for OP status.

Supports Fabric and Forge.

Plug-and-play: No additional configuration files required; takes effect immediately after installation.

 

# Highlights

Zero configuration: No need to modify permission plugins or  server.properties .

Lightweight: Uses almost no resources and does not affect server performance.

Fair gameplay: Allows survival-mode players to enjoy convenient teleportation without imbalance.

 

# Why choose to download?

If you are a server owner who wants regular players to teleport freely without breaking game balance, this is a simple and safe solution.

If you are a player tired of asking admins for help with teleporting, this mod gives you full control over your movement.

No complex permission systems needed—just one mod to solve your teleport permission problems.
